meta.title: Altitude Music — Recording Studio, Mix & Mastering | Louvain-la-Neuve

hero.title: Sound that sounds like you.
hero.sub: Recording, mixing, mastering, custom production. We capture your world and push it higher.

rec.name: Recording
rec.desc: Vocals, instruments, live sessions. Treated booth, condenser and ribbon mics.

mix.name: Mix & Master
mix.desc: Hybrid analog mix, loudness-aware mastering. Revisions included.

cover.name: Cover Art
cover.desc: Art direction, photo, design. From single to EP, we build your visual.

prod.name: Custom Production
prod.desc: Beats, instrumentals, arrangements. We build around your voice.

about.storyText: Altitude Music was founded in 2023 as a non-profit, but the collective has been around since 2018. Since then, we've been a key player in the Louvain-la-Neuve music scene. Our mission is to support and develop the artistic potential of young creators, putting hip-hop music forward as a means of artistic expression.
about.teamText: Production, mix, master, cover art, music videos… Our team brings everything together to move your project forward, from sound to image.
